mapper.sql: select pd.problem_id, pd.task_id, pd.problem_no, pd.problem_level, pd.current_status, pd.submit_date, pd.settle_date, pd.verify_date, pd.whether_defect, pd.whether_overtime, pd.whether_pro_recurrence, pd.whether_att_required, pd.whether_update_version, pd.solution_time_over_one_day, pd.defect_desc, pd.production_year, pd.batch_id, pd.dept_id, pd.remarks, pd.del_flag, pd.create_by, pd.create_time, pd.update_by, pd.update_time, COALESCE(t.task_name, pd.task_name) as task_name, COALESCE(t.task_code, pd.task_no) as task_code, COALESCE(t.product, pd.product) as product, COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(t.internal_closure_date, '%Y-%m-%d'), DATE_FORMAT(pd.internal_closure_date, '%Y-%m-%d')) as internal_closure_date, COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(t.functional_test_date, '%Y-%m-%d'), DATE_FORMAT(pd.functional_test_date, '%Y-%m-%d')) as functional_test_date, COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(t.production_version_date, '%Y-%m-%d'), DATE_FORMAT(pd.production_version_date, '%Y-%m-%d')) as production_version_date, COALESCE(t.schedule_status, pd.schedule_status) as schedule_status, COALESCE(b.batch_no, pd.pro_batch_no) as batch_no, DATE_FORMAT(b.plan_production_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as plan_production_date, d.dept_name, uc.nick_name as create_by_name, uu.nick_name as update_by_name from pm_prolist_defect pd left join pm_task t on pd.task_id = t.task_id left join pm_production_batch b on pd.batch_id = b.batch_id left join sys_dept d on pd.dept_id = d.dept_id left join sys_user uc on pd.create_by COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = uc.user_name left join sys_user uu on pd.update_by COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = uu.user_name
mapper.insert: insert into pm_prolist_defect ( task_id, problem_no, problem_level, current_status, submit_date, settle_date, verify_date, whether_defect, whether_overtime, whether_pro_recurrence, whether_att_required, whether_update_version, solution_time_over_one_day, defect_desc, production_year, batch_id, dept_id, remarks, del_flag, create_by, create_time ) values ( #{taskId}, #{problemNo}, #{problemLevel}, #{currentStatus}, #{submitDate}, #{settleDate}, #{verifyDate}, #{whetherDefect}, #{whetherOvertime}, #{whetherProRecurrence}, #{whetherAttRequired}, #{whetherUpdateVersion}, #{solutionTimeOverOneDay}, #{defectDesc}, #{productionYear}, #{batchId}, #{deptId}, #{remarks}, '0', #{createBy}, now() )
mapper.update:
update pm_prolist_defect
task_id = #{taskId}, problem_no = #{problemNo}, problem_level = #{problemLevel}, current_status = #{currentStatus}, submit_date = #{submitDate}, settle_date = #{settleDate}, verify_date = #{verifyDate},
whether_defect = #{whetherDefect}, whether_overtime = #{whetherOvertime}, whether_pro_recurrence = #{whetherProRecurrence}, whether_att_required = #{whetherAttRequired}, whether_update_version = #{whetherUpdateVersion}, solution_time_over_one_day = #{solutionTimeOverOneDay}, defect_desc = #{defectDesc}, production_year = #{productionYear}, batch_id = #{batchId}, dept_id = #{deptId}, remarks = #{remarks}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now()
where problem_id = #{problemId}
update pm_prolist_defect set del_flag = '1', problem_no = concat(problem_no, '_DEL_', problem_id) where problem_id in #{id}
mapper.select: select batch_id as batchId, batch_no as batchNo from pm_production_batch where production_year = #{year} order by sort_order, batch_id
select DATE_FORMAT(plan_production_date, '%Y-%m-%d') from pm_production_batch where batch_id = #{batchId}

select t.task_id, t.task_name, t.task_code, t.product, DATE_FORMAT(t.internal_closure_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as internal_closure_date, DATE_FORMAT(t.functional_test_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as functional_test_date, DATE_FORMAT(t.production_version_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as production_version_date, t.schedule_status from pm_task t where t.task_id = #{taskId}
